result.stdout:
Description:
  Apply WpfToAvalonia code fixes using the Roslyn workspace API.

Usage:
  WpfToAvaloniaAnalyzers.Cli [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)                    Path to a .sln or .csproj file.
  -s, --scope <scope>                             Scope to apply fixes: document, project, or solution.
  --project <project>                             Project name to target when running on a solution.
  -d, --document <document>                       Document path for document scope.
  -id, --diagnostic, --diagnostics <diagnostics>  Diagnostic IDs to apply fixes for.
  -a, --code-action <code-action>                 Code action title to apply when multiple fixes are available.
  --mode <mode>                                   Execution mode: sequential, parallel, or fixall. [default: sequential]
  --version                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information

Usage:

Options:

  -s, --scope <scope>                             Scope to apply fixes: document, project, or solution.

  -d, --document <document>                       Document path for document scope.
  -id, --diagnostic, --diagnostics <diagnostics>  Diagnostic IDs to apply fixes for.
  -a, --code-action <code-action>                 Code action title to apply when multiple fixes are available.
  --mode <mode>                                   Execution mode: sequential, parallel, or fixall. [default: sequential]
